# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 0.1.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 0.1.5 | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

If you have discovered a security vulnerability in `memoryblock`, please email hello@mgks.dev directly.

We treat all security reports with the highest priority and will do our best to respond within 48 hours to coordinate a disclosure and patch.
